data.title: Apple Spark Hope For America's Semiconductor Comeback: Key Supplier TSMC Reportedly Begins Producing Chips In US For iPhone Maker
data.description: Despite initial challenges, such as construction delays and workforce issues, TSMC's investment in Arizona is progressing well.

data.title: Abbott Laboratories' Q3 Earnings: Revenue And EPS Beat, Company Says Well-Positioned To Achieve Upper End Of Annual Forecast
data.description: Abbott Laboratories reported third-quarter 2024 sales of $10.64B, with Medical Devices leading 11.7% sales growth. Adjusted EPS of $1.21 beat analyst expectations. Full-year guidance was updated.

data.title: Angi Stock Is Moving Higher Wednesday: What's Going On?
data.description: Angi announced a series of management changes this week including the departure of senior vice president, chief accounting officer and controller of Angi Christopher Bohnert. Bohnert will resign from his role, effective Nov. 1. He will remain with the company for some time to assist with the transition period.

data.title: Market Clubhouse Morning Memo - October 16th, 2024 (Trade Strategy For SPY, QQQ, AAPL, MSFT, NVDA, GOOGL, META And TSLA)
data.description: Good Morning Traders! In today's Market Clubhouse Morning Memo, we will discuss SPY, QQQ, AAPL, MSFT, NVDA, GOOGL, META, and TSLA.

data.title: Nuclear Stocks Soar As Amazon Becomes Latest Tech Giant To Invest In Nuclear Power
data.description: AWS, Amazon's cloud computing subsidiary, said it signed three new agreements on Wednesday to support the development of nuclear energy projects, including the construction of several new Small Modular Reactors (SMRs).
